particulars.description: All and whole subjects known as and forming part of 6A & 6B (otherwise subjects on the northside of 2-4) east main street, uphall, EH52 5DA being the subjects registered under title number WLN43876.
All and whole subjects forming part and portion of the subjects known as 8-10A east main stret, uphall, EH52 5DA for more details please refer to the instrument.

All and whole those subjects delineated in red on the plan, forming part and portion of the subjects known as 8 - 10 east main street,uphall, broxburn registered in the land register of scotland under title number WLN59724.

All and whole the subjects known as and forming (one) 8, 8A, 10 and 10A east main street, uphall, broxburn being the subjects presently undergoing registration in the land register of scotland under title number WLN59724, and (two) 17 carnegie drive, dunfermline being the subjects presently undergoing registration in the land register of scotland under title number FFE136826.

All and whole the subjects known as and forming (one) 8, 8A, 10 and 10A east main street, uphall, broxburn being the subjects presently undergoing registration in the land register of scotland under title number WLN59724, and (two) 17 carnegie drive, dunfermline being the subjects presently undergoing registration in the land register of scotland under title number FFE136826.
Subjects on the northeast side of 2-4 east main street, also known as number 6 east main street, uphall, broxburn, EH52 5DA.

All and whole the first floor flatted dwellinghouse known as and forming 17 carnegie drive, dunfermline, KY12 7AN and being the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number FFE136826.

All and whole the subjects known as and forming 8, 8A, 10 & 10A east main street, uphall, broxburn, EH52 5DA, and being the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number WLN59724.

All and whole the residential dwelling known as and forming number 17D carnegie drive, dunfermline KY12 7AN, being the first floor subjects shaded pink on the plan annexed and signed as relative to the standard security, which subjects form (first) part and portion of the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number FFE82581 and (second) part of the subjects described in and disponed by disposition by dunfermline building society with consent in favour of alexander t rolland limited dated fourth and recorded in the division of the general register of sasines for the county of fife on tenth, both days of june in the year nineteen hundred and sixty-four; together with (one) a servitude right of pedestrian access thereto and egress therefrom over the areas owned by aldo luigi marcantonio and anna maria christina marcantonio and hatched in blue and yellow on the said plan (two) the whole rights common, mutual, pro indiviso, servitude, exclusive and other rights pertaining thereto; (three) the heritable fixtures and fittings therein and thereon; (four) the whole parts, privileges and pertinents thereof; and (five) the borrower’s whole right, title and interest present and future in and to the subjects secured.

All and whole the ground floor shop premises known as 149A uphall station road, pumpherston, delineated in green on the plan annexed and signed as relative to the standard security, being part and portion of the subjects described in (first) feu disposition by the county council of the county of midlothian in favour of mrs ann forbes hunter hynd or ramage dated the eighteenth day of june and recorded in the division of the general register of sasines for the county of midlothian on the sixth day of july both in the year nineteen hundred and fifty seven, and (second) disposition by west lothian district council to william kay grieve dated 6 and recorded in the said division of the general register of sasines on 23, both dates in december 1976, under exception of that part of the said subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number MID98981; together with (one) the first floor areas shaded in brown and blue on the said plan (two) the car park area hatched in black on the said plan (three) a right in common with the proprietor of the adjacent commercial unit at known as and forming 149 uphall station road, pumpherston to the area shaded pink on the said plan (four) the whole rights common, mutual, pro indiviso, servitude, exclusive and other rights pertaining thereto; (five) the heritable fixtures and fittings therein and thereon; (six) the whole parts, privileges and pertinents thereof; and (seven) the borrower’s whole right, title and interest present and future in and to the subjects secured.

All and whole the premises known as 21 carnegie drive, dunfermline KY12 7AN, shaded pink on the plan a annexed and signed as relative to the standard security, being the subjects described in (first) disposition by margaret fox or mcdonald to loretto maloco and crescenzo maloco dated 22 november and recorded in the general register of sasines for the county of fife on 1 december, both dates in the year nineteen hundred and forty-eight; (second) contract of excambion between (in the first place) louis pellici and antonia pellici and (in the second place) elizabeth marshall or spence or bennie and andrew allan bennie dated the twenty-fourth day of june and the third day of july and recorded in the said division of the general registers of sasines on the eighth day of october, all dates in the year nineteen hundred and seventy; (third) the subjects described (third) in the disposition by margaret fox or mcdonald in favour of margaret mcdonald or nolan dated twelfth and recorded in the division of the general register of sasines for the county of fife on twenty-seventh, both dates in october in the year nineteen hundred and forty-eight ; and (fourth) the subjects on the ground floor shown shaded brown on plan b annexed and signed as relative to the standard security, being part and portion of the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number FFE82581; under exception of (I) the subjects at first floor level and shaded brown on plan c annexed and signed as relative hereto, and (ii) the first floor subjects shaded in red on the plan d annexed and signed as relative hereto together with (one) the whole rights common, mutual, pro indiviso, servitude, exclusive and other rights pertaining thereto; (two) the heritable fixtures and fittings therein and thereon; (three) the whole parts, privileges and pertinents thereof; and (four) the borrower’s whole right, title and interest present and future in and to the subjects hereby secured.

All and whole the ground floor premises known as 19 carnegie drive, dunfermline KY12 7AN, shaded pink and brown on the plan annexed and signed as relative to the standard security, being the subjects described in (first) disposition by margaret mcdonald or nolan to dunfermline building society dated 29 october and second november and recorded in the division of the general register of sasines for the county of fife on 20 november, all dates in the year nineteen hundred and fifty-three; (second) the subjects disponed in (in the first place) and (in the second place) by the contract of excambion between (in the first place) louis pellici and antonia pellici and (in the second place) elizabeth marshall or spence or bennie and andrew allan bennie dated the twenty-fourth day of june and the third day of july and recorded in the said division of the general registers of sasines on the eighth day of october, all dates in the year nineteen hundred and seventy and (third) the ground floor subjects shaded brown on the said plan forming part and portion of the property known as numbers 15, 17A, 17B and 17C carnegie drive, dunfermline, being the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number FFE82581 together with (one) a servitude right of access over the area hatched in blue on the said plan, forming part of the subjects owned by us, our title thereto being registered in the land register under title number FFE82581 (two) the whole rights common, mutual, pro indiviso, servitude, exclusive and other rights pertaining thereto; (three) the heritable fixtures and fittings therein and thereon; (four) the whole parts, privileges and pertinents thereof; and (five) the borrower’s whole right, title and interest present and future in and to the subjects hereby secured.

(1) all and whole the property known as and forming flats 149/1 and 149/2 uphall station road, pumpherston, EH53 9PB being the whole subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number MID98981; and (2) all and whole the property known as and forming number 20 east main street, uphall, EH52 5DA being the whole subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number WLN2261.

All and whole the ground floor shop premises known as 149 uphall station road, pumpherston, delineated in purple on the plan annexed and signed as relative to the standard security, being part and portion of the subjects described in feu disposition by the county council of the county of midlothian in favour of mrs ann forbes hunter hynd or ramage dated the eighteenth day of june and recorded in the division of the general register of sasines for the county of midlothian on the sixth day of july both in the year nineteen hundred and fifty seven, under exception of that part of the said subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number MID98981; together with (one) a right in common with the proprietor of the adjacent commercial unit known as and forming 149A uphall station road, pumpherston to the area shaded in pink on the said plan; (two) the whole rights common, mutual, pro indiviso, servitude, exclusive and other rights pertaining thereto; (three) the heritable fixtures and fittings therein and thereon; (three) the whole parts, privileges and pertinents thereof; and (four) the borrower’s whole right, title and interest present and future in and to the subjects hereby secured.

All and whole the property known as and forming numbers 15, 17A, 17B and 17C carnegie drive, dunfermline KY12 7AN, being the whole subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number FFE82581 under exception of (first) the areas at ground floor level shaded pink and green on plan a annexed and signed as relative to the standard security; (second) the area at ground floor level shaded purple on plan b annexed and signed as relative hereto (third) the area at first floor level shaded red on plan c annexed and signed as relative hereto.

All and whole the property known as and forming number 15A carnegie drive, dunfermline KY12 7AN, being the subjects shaded in pink and green on the plan annexed and signed as relative to the standard security and which subjects form part and portion of the property known as numbers 15, 17A, 17B & 17C carnegie drive, dunfermline, title to which is registered in the land register of scotland under title number FFE82581; together with (one) a servitude right of access thereto and therefrom over the areas owned by us and hatched in blue and yellow on the plan; (two) the whole rights common, mutual, pro indiviso, servitude, exclusive and other rights pertaining thereto; (three) the heritable fixtures and fittings therein and thereon; (four) the whole parts, privileges and pertinents thereof; and (five) the borrower’s whole right, title and interest present and future in and to the subjects hereby secured.
